features: Deep Hydration: This collagen hydrating mask contains low molecular hyaluronic acid and bio-collagen, quickly penetrating the skin to provide deep hydration, lock in moisture, and deliver long-lasting nourishment for a healthy, radiant complexion.

Pore Minimizing & Brightening: Infused with ultra-low molecular collagen and niacinamide, it tightens pores, enhances skin elasticity, and visibly smooths fine lines and wrinkles, leaving your skin firmer and smoother.

Strengthens Skin Barrier: Enriched with multiple probiotics and Galactomyces Ferment, this mask strengthens the skin barrier, enhances resistance to external stressors, and soothes irritation, promoting healthier skin.

Easy to Use: This overnight gel mask is designed for convenience, allowing you to apply it for 3-4 hours or overnight until it turns transparent. It ensures maximum absorption of key active ingredients, balancing effectiveness and long-lasting results.
For All Skin Types: Formulated with non-toxic, non-irritating ingredients and tested on sensitive skin, this mask ensures gentle care, making it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
